Rohit Kohli Amazing 100 Light Up Vijay Hazare Trophy

Dec 26, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

Rohit & Kohli Smash Stunning Centuries in Vijay Hazare Trophy

The Vijay Hazare Trophy witnessed a spectacular return as star Indian batters Rohit Sharma and Virat Kohli smashed stunning centuries, electrifying the domestic cricket scene. Both players announced their comeback with emphatic performances that dominated their respective matches.
